case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MANUEL ANTONIO LOPEZ GUERRERO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MANUEL ANTONIO LOPEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MANUEL ANTONIO LOPEZ $2,220.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,325.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED MAR-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MANUEL ANTONIO LOPEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA ALBERTO , LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
